'''''Musket''''' was a [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] that was used by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] for their attack upon the [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]]-controlled [[Science Station Youst]]. It was destroyed during the [[Battle of Science Station Youst|battle that resulted]].

==Behind the scenes==
A [[Wikipedia:Musket|musket]] is also a type of early mass-produced firearm.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
